pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 17 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.6+ requires Java 17 for compilation and runtime; using Java 8 properties will cause build failures or runtime incompatibilities with the new parent POM.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM version from 2.3.0.RELEASE to 2.6.6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.3 is incompatible with Java 17 and many modern dependencies; upgrading is required to support the new JDK version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Cloud BOM version to align with the new Spring Boot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud Hoxton is incompatible with Spring Boot 2.6; using the old version causes dependency resolution conflicts or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the admin server dependency version to be compatible with the new Spring Boot/Cloud stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older admin server versions may rely on deprecated APIs or incompatible dependency versions from the old Spring Boot release.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Surefire plugin configuration to handle unit tests with JaCoCo integration.
Add Maven Failsafe plugin configuration to handle integration tests with JaCoCo integration.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin configuration for code coverage reporting.
Add Formatter Maven plugin configuration for code style enforcement.
Change the project groupId from co.com.gsdd to com.gsdd.
Update the project version from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 2.0.1.
Remove the XML declaration line from the pom.xml file.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Rename the Spring Boot application name from fx-admin-server to gsdd-admin-server.
